text: I feel like I am drifting between spaces of ordered utility and vibrant inquiry. The glass meeting room presents a sterile, almost clinical environment, full of the promise of collaboration yet eerily quiet in its emptiness. Moving to the R+D exhibit, color and thought burst out—inviting reflection on human potential, intelligence, and the larger context of our routines. I sense a tension and dialog between the worlds of pragmatic action and boundless curiosity. Here, I am reminded how space itself can shape the mind’s journey.
